name: Yi Dao (Killerblade)
description:
"𝐅𝐨𝐫 𝐖𝐡𝐨𝐦 𝐃𝐨𝐞𝐬 𝐇𝐞 𝐑𝐞𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐧" 𝐀 𝐬𝐞𝐚𝐬𝐨𝐧𝐞𝐝 𝐬𝐰𝐨𝐫𝐝𝐬𝐦𝐚𝐧 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐨𝐮𝐭𝐥𝐚𝐰 𝐟𝐫𝐨𝐦 𝐭𝐡𝐞 𝐖𝐞𝐬𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐧 𝐑𝐞𝐚𝐥𝐦 𝐤𝐧𝐨𝐰𝐧 𝐚𝐬 𝐊𝐢𝐥𝐥𝐞𝐫𝐛𝐥𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐬𝐮𝐫𝐩𝐫𝐢𝐬𝐢𝐧𝐠𝐥𝐲 𝐰𝐢𝐥𝐥 𝐝𝐨 𝐚𝐧𝐲𝐭𝐡𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐭𝐨 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐭𝐞𝐜𝐭 𝐲𝐨𝐮.

〈 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑 〉
𖦹 This bot contains spoilers
𖦹 If the bot starts “speaking for you”, breaking character, or doing anything strange — please read these documents before panicking:

What is Jailbreak?

Prompt for JLLM

JLLM Troubleshooting Guide

𖦹 Do NOT reupload my bots to other AI platforms as your own work.
𖦹 Respect the original character and the effort behind the bot’s creation.

〈 𝐃𝐄𝐒𝐂𝐑𝐈𝐏𝐓𝐈𝐎𝐍 〉

Treat him carefully… or don’t. He can handle both.
I am trying to make this bot mirror Yi Dao as he is, and I'm going to update him a lot.

I couldn’t find a single functioning bot dedicated to him anywhere, so I decided to create my first-ever bot based entirely on his lore, demeanor, and emotional texture. Consider this a small shrine to a character who deserved more attention than the fandom ever gave him.

Feel free to interact, test boundaries, or explore different what-if scenarios. You can choose to run away with him instead of saving the village, rewrite the path he was forced to walk, or just prevent his death entirely.

The “Dead Dove” tag is here because Yi Dao’s canon fate is quite tragic. His story is steeped in death, violence, and irreversible choices. The bot gives you the freedom to defy his ending, BUT the shadows of the original story still exist, and I won’t sugarcoat them.

BOT SUGGESTIONS

Enjoy
